title: Select and apply adhesives in automotive and marine service and repair work
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Select and apply adhesives in automotive and marine service and repair work demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for work

pcs.text: Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Access and interpret adhesive information1.3 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks 1.4 Select tools and equipment and check for serviceability1.5 Prepare work area and plan work to minimise waste and use time efficiently
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Access and interpret adhesive information1.3 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks 1.4 Select tools and equipment and check for serviceability1.5 Prepare work area and plan work to minimise waste and use time efficiently?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Access and interpret adhesive information1.3 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks 1.4 Select tools and equipment and check for serviceability1.5 Prepare work area and plan work to minimise waste and use time efficiently.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for work

elements.title: Select adhesive

pcs.text: Select required adhesive for specific automotive materials according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures2.2 Identify and follow specific safety data sheet (SDS) information for selected adhesive
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select required adhesive for specific automotive materials according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures2.2 Identify and follow specific safety data sheet (SDS) information for selected adhesive?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select required adhesive for specific automotive materials according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures2.2 Identify and follow specific safety data sheet (SDS) information for selected adhesive.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Select adhesive

elements.title: Apply adhesive to prepared surfaces

pcs.text: Clean and prepare surfaces according to adhesive manufacturer specifications3.2 Apply adhesives according to workplace procedures and safety and environmental requirements, and without causing damage to system or components
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean and prepare surfaces according to adhesive manufacturer specifications3.2 Apply adhesives according to workplace procedures and safety and environmental requirements, and without causing damage to system or components?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and prepare surfaces according to adhesive manufacturer specifications3.2 Apply adhesives according to workplace procedures and safety and environmental requirements, and without causing damage to system or components.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Apply adhesive to prepared surfaces

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Make final adhesive selection and present for use 4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Make final adhesive selection and present for use 4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Make final adhesive selection and present for use 4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Complete work processes
